textByHash.57ed4c372de3314fa68c0ff9e39bda9d8e760e98: Oh...OK. You'd better come in then.
textByHash.bb576df90620d2caf5ea8402193d506ec2b24de6: Where do you think you're going? This is private property!
textByHash.e58ce01427cab7a6c5d9598bca9f88754bcd8d06: Ah...Saba is still alive and kicking?
textByHash.98f80a94ee937c851a5380ab3a394a0493b89c7d: I do know of a secret way up to Death Plateau, the Imperial Guard would be able to use it at night and not be seen until it was too late!
textByHash.d1d4c47860a74ef95051d7c2afc12680ba967b92: I'd be happy to show you it if you do something for me first.
textByHash.c12752bddc050aaad5c282b0b94acc791294345b: I don't get into town much and I'm getting low on supplies. I need ten loaves of bread and ten cooked trout, that should see me through the winter.
textByHash.f4312ee9f52f4007a36a1749637cf26e9994346d: Yes. My climbing boots need to have new spikes, so can you take them to Dunstan in Burthorpe? He always puts my spikes on for me.
textByHash.fba1668676983caaf2bef9c64de12c3574be055c: Has Dunstan added spikes to my climbing boots yet?
textByHash.2e426a74169312470a524be147679cceca659f57: Well, when he has, bring the boots to me with ten loaves of bread and ten cooked trout. I have to prepare for the winter, after all.
textByHash.0551b63784f9fb954b5aa674fcfa7bfaf7ca9483: Have you brought me the items I asked for?
textByHash.881e2ee463e3aeecf2aaca2ce9f95aa9c5847d8e: These are expensive, do not lose another pair!
textByHash.55f4b11c19da27fcc1fcd7bab931ef3e8adaecef: Thank you very much traveller. I'm now ready for the winter!
textByHash.b87feea53f3760193cc09101cce6220a606dab54: Yes, of course! I drew up a map in case I ever needed to use it again.
textByHash.5629233dc2d6730caa26e5d9142fedf99cfb1130: I don't think the Trolls have found the secret way yet, if they had I would've been attacked by now.
textByHash.4e351787c58927fc4c7ea25538a99a9d60422bd0: You are wise for one so young.
textByHash.95d0b12615cde60b1aa9f7fa79b73fa4575d05dc: Hello again traveller. What can I do for you?
textByHash.48b090470873c980f30613fc5c448495e646579b: Never mind. I'll quickly draw you another one.
textByHash.4c84d3ed74db29e7241e2df382555bd726b3a5b8: To get back to Burthorpe follow the path going east.
textByHash.4b3480b5813c7d331c6f33d32c3943d43d3313ac: I thought you were going to investigate the secret way to Death Plateau? Use the back door to my hut, hop over the stile and follow that path.
textByHash.02537673eb65c484a35a4ecc55e6616fe1e033c0: It has been a long time since someone has asked me about Trollweiss.
textByHash.c42881935eb3eba55ac9f35435fcfcfdeaedaa71: In the old days Trollweiss could be found all over the mountains, but recently it has been disappearing!
textByHash.7e5c2f61c5fb7c16849bb8a58d3b95c23b6782fb: There is one place, where I am sure it still grows, but it is impossible to get to.
textByHash.91f3ac829a19f95c87fa082ce0be177062534165: Ahhh, the youth of today. So sure of their prowess. But who am I to stop you from walking into your doom, if that is what you wish to do!
textByHash.37430828b3c8f06009ac833b37779359762bf047: Well, you will need to enter the domain of the ice trolls! This is an area full of wicked beasts and biting cold. From there you will find a way down a slope to a plateau where the Trollweiss grows.
textByHash.8606460c6d2d904ec18f215f64fe6263eea85e3b: It used to be easy to get to this plateau, but it is now snowed over and virtually inaccessible. That's global warming for you!
textByHash.32eb196cbc8c2c1a4f4372dcf89448983cb2e71b: If you could make some sort of sled, you could probably get down there but I don't know where that would lead you, as you will not be able to go up the mountain again.
textByHash.b24d083685523b2a8665aa6c3d906f3b1b6edaba: Pah, who are you to talk? Without me you would never have found the secret path to the plateau!!
textByHash.3e6c28cc042e266ac47d4cf2d750069502b96323: Well, I'm no expert. Maybe you should speak to someone who knows more about such technical stuff.
textByHash.a69d928bf57b428590a27c43cd41520702668023: Why don't you ask Dunstan. He's always helped me with my spiked boots.
textByHash.1e69626aae28f4475cef07897c9c780989c04bc1: Sure, I'll sell you some in your size for 12 gold.
textByHash.c5014699163df3c037c3d3b60ba6b23c27222a1b: We are expert guides that take adventurers, such as yourself, on mountaineering expeditions.
textByHash.f92b7d3fcc9cf8c251fcf2f562b8c0e4bcf8f84c: I used to take adventurers up Death Plateau and further north before the trolls came. I know these mountains well.
textByHash.97378d878aa43c800d577fc3a2f0c035b8f9abb1: Thanks, I built it myself! I'm usually self sufficient but I can't earn any money with the trolls camped on Death Plateau.
